Frontend perf bake-off — runs

Each row is the median of N runs (the first run of every batch is dropped as a warm-up). Stat cells show median (min–max).

  • ★ Network quiet is the primary ranking metric — navigation start until the data layer stops fetching. Rank on the headline (content-based) columns.
  • Do NOT rank on load or LCP. For an SPA the load event fires long before the data the user came for has arrived, and LCP is often blank (—) because the largest content is a client-rendered table injected after first interaction. Blank LCP is expected, not an error.
  • Only compare rows with a similar data-item count, CPU× and network preset — a 0-row baseline and a 2000-row page are not comparable.
  • Newest rows are at the bottom.
Run contextHeadlineNetworkReferenceMemoryWeightNotes
UTC timeScenarioBranchCommitCPUCoresOSChromeCPU×NetCacheData itemsRuns (N)CollectorData rendered (ms)Network quiet (ms) ★Data reqsSlowest req (ms)TTFB (ms)FCP (ms)load (ms)CLSLCP (ms)JS heap (MB)Heap snapshot (MB)DOM nodesRequestsTransfer dec. (KB)Notes
2026-07-01T00:04:57Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain556c767Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm04 of 51.0.082 (73–98)79 (71–94)116 (14–19)4104690.021281.71.131446.1prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000, empty baseline table (0 rows), warm-up dropped
2026-07-01T00:35:16Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain045bd12Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0556 (473–589)479 (448–510)1372 (354–395)31421080.021036517.9226304680.8prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; FIRST populated baseline — full 1506-line table via single stocktake+preferences query (1 request); 14 of 17 cols (Doses Per Unit/Doses Counted/Donor hidden by store prefs); uncommitted lines-table feature on base 045bd12; warm-up dropped. NOT comparable to the earlier 0-row baseline.
2026-07-01T01:41:39Zstocktake-detail-baselinemain116b5d3Apple M3 Pro11macOS 26.5.1149.0.0.06×nonewarm15064 of 51.0.0505 (500–601)432 (426–517)1331 (325–398)313210708603.416.8226334679.8prod build (vite preview :4173), GraphQL proxied to OMS :8000; WITH client-side filter (roadmap step 3, row-toggle strategy) + mSupply design tokens; 1506-line table, 14 of 17 cols (3 gated by store prefs); single stocktake+preferences query (1 request); warm-up dropped. Load path unchanged vs the prior 1506-row baseline (filtering is client-side) — confirms no load regression.
